subcodes.first_line: All glory be Thine, O Thou Who art my God, my Beloved,and my Lord! Thou seest my poverty and my destitution, and my suffering and the hardships and trials that I have sustained
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی و محبوبی و سلطانی تری فقری و افتقاری ثم ضری و اضطراری
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @presence of; reunion with God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @praise and encouragement
